meaning: n.羽蛇神(古代墨西哥阿兹特克人与托尔特克人崇奉的重要神袛)
examples: B. 999 AD Quetzalcoatl died. Exactly 52 years, the length of one Heaven.
Further, the fundamentalists claimed that Quetzalcoatl is an important religious figure in certain Mormon doctrines, and there are certainly plenty of them alive and worshipping like mad.
